# Vendor Services

These directories contain integration modules for third-party services.

## OpenBB (`vendors/openbb/`)
Provides structured financial data via OpenBB Platform — fundamental data, technical indicators, macroeconomic metrics.

## OpenClaw (`vendors/openclaw/`)
Core OpenClaw pipeline orchestration service — main analysis workflow engine.

## TradingAgents (`vendors/trading-agents/`)
Multi-strategy analysis via TradingAgents framework — investor debate, portfolio manager, risk assessment.

## TrendRadar (`vendors/trendradar/`)
Trend detection and radar scanning service — 15-minute interval market monitoring.

> Do NOT modify vendor source code directly. Submit changes via vendor-specific PRs.
